originalTitle: Fixing Reinforcement Learning with PufferLib - Live Dev
title: Refactoring PufferLib Dev Branch for e3b, P3O, and Hyperparameter Sweeps
summary: Cleaned up the dev branch to integrate e3b and P3O algorithms, add carbs and protein hyperparameter sweep backends, and fix training bugs including lstm state and advantage masking. Optimized a C function for faster advantage computation and validated baseline reproducibility on breakout.
